tool_input.command:
cd /home/sites/phlix/phlix-hub
# Replace lowercase namespace segments with TitleCase in tests/ and any cross-references
mapfile -t UNIT_FILES < <(grep -rl 'Tests\\unit' . --include='*.php' --include='*.md' --include='*.xml' --exclude-dir=vendor --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.phpunit.cache --exclude-dir=.caliber 2>/dev/null)
mapfile -t INTEG_FILES < <(grep -rl 'Tests\\integration' . --include='*.php' --include='*.md' --include='*.xml' --exclude-dir=vendor --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.phpunit.cache --exclude-dir=.caliber 2>/dev/null)
printf '%s\n' "${UNIT_FILES[@]}" | xargs sed -i 's|Tests\\unit\b|Tests\\Unit|g'
printf '%s\n' "${INTEG_FILES[@]}" | xargs sed -i 's|Tests\\integration\b|Tests\\Integration|g'
echo "Verify residuals:"
grep -rl 'Tests\\unit\b\|Tests\\integration\b' . --include='*.php' --include='*.md' --include='*.xml' --exclude-dir=vendor --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.phpunit.cache --exclude-dir=.caliber 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
echo "Re-running composer dump-autoload --strict-psr:"
composer dump-autoload --strict-psr -o --no-interaction 2>&1 | tail -10
tool_input.description: Fix lowercase namespace decls in phlix-hub and re-verify

tool_input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: resolve phpstan/psalm/phpunit CI failures

- Wire AuditLogger into RequestController via DI (HUB-A09-2 follow-up):
  add `audit` constructor arg, use it in approve/deny + admin gate.
- Add `logAdminAction()` to AuditLogger for structured admin audit trail.
- Update RequestController and ClaimRequestHandler tests to inject
  AuditLogger mock.
- AuthManager: type `getClientIp()` return narrow, declare const types,
  remove unsupported by-ref usage in rate-limit helpers.
- Application.php: convert route arrow functions with path params to
  closures with `/** @var array<string, string> $typedParams */` cast,
  matching the existing pattern at the heartbeat/info/delete routes.
- Narrow mixed → typed assignments via local @var mixed locals across
  controllers and DTO hydrators (InviteLink, LibraryShare,
  LibrarySharingHandler, RelayServerHandler, RequestManager,
  TlsCertificateManager).
- Add typed class consts (DnsAliasManager, EnrollmentJwtService,
  TlsCertificateManager).
- EnrollmentJwtServiceTest: replace flaky last-char base64url flip with
  a middle-of-signature tamper (base64url padding bits could leave the
  decoded signature unchanged when flipping certain trailing chars).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

tool_input.command:
unset GITHUB_TOKEN && gh pr create --title "fix: resolve phpstan/psalm/phpunit CI failures" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Wire `AuditLogger` into `RequestController` via DI provider and use it in approve/deny/admin-gate (HUB-A09-2 follow-up). Adds a small `logAdminAction()` helper to `AuditLogger`.
- Fix the matching test wiring (`RequestControllerTest`, `ClaimRequestHandlerTest`) to inject the new `AuditLogger` constructor arg.
- Resolve all Psalm errors (61 → 0): typed class consts, narrow mixed assignments via `@var mixed` locals across hydrators/controllers, refactor `AuthManager` rate-limit helpers off PHP references (Psalm `UnsupportedPropertyReferenceUsage`), and convert `Application` route arrow functions with path params to the existing `/** @var array<string, string> $typedParams */` closure pattern.
- Resolve PHPStan errors: narrow `AuthManager::getClientIp()` to `string`, and avoid the `nullCoalesce`/`varTag` conflict in `TlsCertificateManager::needsRenewal()`.
- Fix a flaky `EnrollmentJwtServiceTest::testValidateEnrollmentJwtReturnsNullForTamperedToken` — the old single last-char base64url flip could decode to the same bytes due to padding bits, so the tamper now lands in the middle of the signature.

## Test plan
- [x] `./vendor/bin/phpstan analyze --no-progress` → `[OK] No errors`
- [x] `./vendor/bin/psalm --no-progress --show-info=false` → `No errors found!`
- [x] `./vendor/bin/phpunit --no-coverage` → 417 tests, 1198 assertions, 17 skipped, 0 failures (10 consecutive runs)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
